title: persoonia lanceolata var. angustifolia
intro: Persoonia lanceolata var. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved Persoonia, is a shrub native to the eastern and southern regions of Australia. It has been traditionally used by Indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its essential oils and alkaloids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-spasmodic properties. Persoonia lanceolata var. angustifolia can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
